form.formComment: Comes here second-up after eight days. Lacklustre first-up performance when was well back in the run when 9th (Fr3) over 1609m at Newcastle, at the bell was 8th-15.6 beaten 19 m by Halloween (1:55.50) in NR up to 35 on April 6 at $41. Might need more time.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th-10.01 beaten 10 m by Robust Easton (1:54.10) in 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on April 7 at $34. Not here.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Sr3) at Penrith (2:06.40) beating Designa Label in MAIDEN on March 20 at $1.20 at the bell was 2nd-2.18. Two runs back won by 13 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (1:51.90) beating You Are My Wish in MAIDEN on March 17 at $2.20 at the bell was leading 7.33. Cops the outside barrier but looks a talent.
